channel.title: OpenAI-Selection
channel.description: OpenAI News から選別された記事フィード

item.title: コーディング評価におけるシグナルとノイズの分離(Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations)
item.description: A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.

item.title: K-12教育者が実践的なAIスキルを身につけるのを支援(Helping K–12 educators build practical AI skills)
item.description: OpenAI Academy and the Walton Family Foundation are bringing hands-on AI Skills Jams to help K–12 educators build practical AI skills for the classroom.

item.title: GPT-Liveの紹介(Introducing GPT-Live)
item.description: A new generation of voice models for natural human-AI interaction, now powering ChatGPT Voice.
